definition: Relating to the heart and blood vessels.
One tiny dot of color on a screen; millions make an image.
example: That icon looks blurry when pixels are stretched.

definition: An animal that hunts other animals for food.
example: The shark is an apex predator in its reef habitat.

definition: A chemical change microbes cause in food, like bread rising.
example: Yogurt forms through fermentation of milk.

definition: Mass in motion; idea that keeps teams rolling forward.
example: Early goals gave the team momentum.
